name: What is he doing?
description: Discord webhook notifications for Geometry Dash.

webhook-url.name: Webhook URL
webhook-url.description: Your Discord webhook URL. Leave empty to disable.

webhook-username.name: Webhook Display Name
webhook-username.description: The name shown as the sender in Discord.

test-webhook.name: Send Test Webhook
test-webhook.description: Toggle on to send a test webhook immediately.

max-retries.name: Max Webhook Retries
max-retries.description: How many times to retry a failed webhook before giving up.

player-name.name: Player Name
player-name.description: Subject of each Discord message (e.g., 'imes opened Geometry Dash!'). Empty defaults to 'He'.

notify-game-open.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting Geometry Dash
notify-game-open.description: When the game is opened (main menu) and when Geometry Dash is closed (includes session length).

notify-play-level.name: Notify on Playing/Exiting a Level
notify-play-level.description: When starting a level (level name, creator, ID) and when exiting a level (includes time in that level).

notify-editor-testplay.name: Notify on Editor Playtest
notify-editor-testplay.description: When playtesting a level from the editor.

notify-level-complete.name: Notify on Level Complete
notify-level-complete.description: When a level is beaten (includes level info and total time spent on that run).

notify-new-best.name: Notify on Session's New Best
notify-new-best.description: When you get a new best on a level (current level session only).

notify-editor.name: Notify on Opening/Exiting the Editor
notify-editor.description: When opening the level editor and when leaving it (save & exit, exit, or exit without save), with session length.

notify-idle.name: Notify on Idle
notify-idle.description: Send a webhook when you've been idle for 30s, 2m, 15m, or 1h.
